channel.title: Magentic on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Magentic on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: Announcing: Multi-agent orchestration patterns including Magentic in Microsoft Agent Framework
item.description:
Microsoft Agent Framework is now generally available for multi-agent orchestration patterns, including the dynamic Magentic pattern. The announcement cites benchmark results for Magentic, including 38% on GAIA and competitive results on AssistantBench and WebArena.

  • Source: Azure Updates
